creator: jiangjun12321@gmail.com
text: In /usr/local/share/applications/org.flameshot.Flameshot.desktop file, the Exec line is Exec=/usr/bin/flameshot, but flameshot is actually installed at /usr/local/bin/flameshot. This lead to startup failure says "Failed to execute command /usr/bin/flameshot (No such file or derectory)" when clicking desktop launcher.
